name: cruise-deck-mcp
description: MCP server for cruise ship deck plans and cabin noise analysis

tools.name: get_cabin_info
tools.description: Look up details for a specific cabin on a specific ship.

tools.name: find_quiet_cabins
tools.description: Find the quietest cabins on a ship, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: compare_cabins
tools.description: Compare two or more cabins on the same ship side by side.

tools.name: get_deck_layout
tools.description: Return the layout of a single deck — cabins and amenities.
